clause.title: Calculation of climate specific part load value for chillers

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The climate specific part load value for a group of one or more chillers must be calculated in accordance with the following formula:

ol.li: CSPLV MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaam4qaiaado facaWGqbGaamitaiaadAfaaaa@3A19@ R0lGODlhNgASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAANgASAAACYISPqcvtD6OctNqLY9gmnO0BHsghYEKKJ1Oq Yah+srnAomN3s37vvQLLAYc8FM13FBofrWJO2YMiG0HXkiidHnlS6EhD/EWpviZzu7p1t7FJanZK m0jNbOaOz+v3/P69AAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMd0FAQAHCERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2Rl UGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJh ABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA 9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg0MA AgCDUwACAINQAAIAg0wAAgCDVgAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/Y8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAi Pz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1h dGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8x OTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bWk+QzwvbWk+PG1pPlM8L21pPjxtaT5QPC9taT48bWk+ TDwvbWk+PG1pPlY8L21pPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4A If8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGBAAAAAAAADs== climate specific part load value; and

EERnMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyraiaadw eacaWGsbWaaSbaaSqaaiaad6gaaeqaaaaa@3981@ R0lGODlhJgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAJgAYAAACV4SPqcvtD6OctNqrgt7B8H18UxeWpnc+JMq2 wLo6MDLTNlS38ZvKHP0DaiQ5nsu4k6WKxqYqQdrlkgvpkUkVij6gV9c7zGKqw3GkIzaX0mpUuQ2P y+fqAgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMeQFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVU aW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9E L0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I 9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg0UAAgCDRQACAINS AAMAGwAACwEAAgCDbgAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP5PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+ PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRo TUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5 OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5FPC9taT48bXN1Yj48bWk+UjwvbWk+ PG1pPm48L21pPjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBggAAAAAAAA7 = the weighted average energy efficiency ratio of the chillers that operate to provide n% of the design cooling load under the staging strategy to be deployed, determined in accordance with (2) and (3); and

αnMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeqySde2aaS baaSqaaiaad6gaaeqaaaaa@38B5@ R0lGODlhFAAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFAAYAAACLoSPqcvtD6OctMaAg9EP7+9wn9iQgLmYaJqs ind6LpJtmTYzNYXzZ4XLWYbESgEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHbBQEABwdEU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJh c2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRN VCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0 Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAK AQACBISxA2EDABsAAAsBAAIAg24AAAEBAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz7Dw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249 IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50 ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMu b3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT4mI3gwM0IxOzwvbWk+PG1pPm48 L21pPjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01h dGhUeXBlMDAyBggAAAAAAAA7 = load weighting factors specified in—
Table S47C2a for chillers serving a Class 5, 6, 7, 8 or 9b building or a Class 9a building other than a ward area; or
Table S47C2b for chillers serving a Class 3 or 9c building or a Class 9a ward area.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: EERnMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyraiaadw eacaWGsbWaaSbaaSqaaiaad6gaaeqaaaaa@3981@ R0lGODlhJgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAJgAYAAACV4SPqcvtD6OctNqrgt7B8H18UxeWpnc+JMq2 wLo6MDLTNlS38ZvKHP0DaiQ5nsu4k6WKxqYqQdrlkgvpkUkVij6gV9c7zGKqw3GkIzaX0mpUuQ2P y+fqAgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMeQFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVU aW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9E L0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I 9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg0UAAgCDRQACAINS AAMAGwAACwEAAgCDbgAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP5PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+ PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRo TUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5 OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5FPC9taT48bXN1Yj48bWk+UjwvbWk+ PG1pPm48L21pPjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBggAAAAAAAA7 is determined as the weighted average energy efficiency ratio of the chillers operating to meet n% of the design cooling load under the staging strategy to be deployed, allowing for the part load efficiencies at—

ol.li: a chilled water leaving temperature of 7°C; and
a chilled water flow rate that corresponds to a 6°C difference between entering and leaving temperatures at the rated cooling capacity, when determined in accordance with AHRI 551/591; and

for water-cooled chillers—
a condenser water entering temperature that is determined by adding the design approach temperature to the outside wet bulb temperature listed in—
Table S47C2c for chillers serving a Class 5, 6, 7, 8 or 9b building or a Class 9a building other than a ward area; or
Table S47C2d for chillers serving a Class 3 or 9c building or a Class 9a ward area; and
a condenser water flow rate that corresponds to a 6°C difference between entering and leaving temperature at the rated cooling capacity, when determined in accordance with AHRI 551/591; and

for air-cooled chillers, the outside dry bulb temperature listed in—
Table S47C2e for chillers serving a Class 5, 6, 7, 8 or 9b building or a Class 9a building other than a ward area; or
Table S47C2f for a Class 3 or 9c building or a Class 9a ward area.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The EERnMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyraiaadw eacaWGsbWaaSbaaSqaaiaad6gaaeqaaaaa@3981@ R0lGODlhJgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAJgAYAAACV4SPqcvtD6OctNqrgt7B8H18UxeWpnc+JMq2 wLo6MDLTNlS38ZvKHP0DaiQ5nsu4k6WKxqYqQdrlkgvpkUkVij6gV9c7zGKqw3GkIzaX0mpUuQ2P y+fqAgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMeQFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVU aW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9E L0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I 9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg0UAAgCDRQACAINS AAMAGwAACwEAAgCDbgAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP5PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+ PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRo TUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5 OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5FPC9taT48bXN1Yj48bWk+UjwvbWk+ PG1pPm48L21pPjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBggAAAAAAAA7 values in (2) must be determined using test measurements and calculations performed in accordance with the procedures of AHRI 551/591.
